user.title: Authenticate with Codex Usage
user.description:
To authenticate, [open link]({url}) and sign in with your ChatGPT account.

After authorizing, your browser may show a localhost connection error. This is expected. Copy the full URL from the browser address bar and paste it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Codex Usage
reauth_confirm.description:
Codex Usage needs to reauthenticate your ChatGPT account.

[open link]({url}) and sign in again. After authorizing, your browser may show a localhost connection error. This is expected. Copy the full URL from the browser address bar and paste it below.

error.missing_code: Enter the authorization code or redirect URL.

abort.already_configured: This ChatGPT account is already configured.
